field_values.action_summary: Carter stays with Tars Tarkas to lead the land campaign. After unloading Thark mounts, the combined Thark and Heliumite forces launch a decisive assault on the remaining Zodangan land camps, crushing the resistance despite being outnumbered.
field_values.camera_intent: Wide sweeping shots of the charge; Low-angle "hero" shots (Carter/Tars Tarkas); Handheld/shaky cam for ground combat; Close-ups of Thark mounts (thoats) in action
movement_notes: Coordination between land and air forces
The scale of the zodangan_land_camps being destroyed
field_values.transition_notes:
# Scene Contract: CH026_SC004

## Production Intent
The scene focuses on the tactical execution of a combined-arms land campaign. It requires high-scale coordination between Thark and Heliumite forces to demonstrate coalition strength through a decisive assault on Zodangan positions. Visual emphasis must be placed on the kinetic energy of the charge and the physical presence of the Thark mounts (thoats) during combat.

## Required Cast
- john_carter
- tars_tarkas
- Thark Warriors
- Heliumite Soldiers
- Zodangan Remnants

## Required Environments
- The plains/terrain surrounding Helium
- zodangan_land_camps

## Continuity Constraints
- Coordination between land and air forces
- The scale of the zodangan_land_camps being destroyed

## Beat List
- BT001: Carter and Tars Tarkas prepare for the land campaign.
- BT002: Unloading of Thark mounts (thoats) to ready the cavalry.
- BT003: Combined Thark and Heliumite forces launch a decisive assault on zodangan_land_camps.
- BT004: Intense ground combat ensues, crushing the Zodangan resistance.
- BT005: Decisive victory is achieved over the remaining Zodangan remnants.
